diagrams.title: SLA Availability Nines Scale
diagrams.description: Visual representation of availability percentages and their corresponding downtime
elements: Scale showing progression from basic to mission-critical
diagrams.purpose: Understanding availability tiers and their business impact

diagrams.title: Shared Responsibility Model by Service Type
diagrams.description: Shows which layer each party manages in IaaS, PaaS, and SaaS
elements: Operating System layer (Shared in PaaS, Provider in SaaS
Middleware/Development Tools layer (Provider in PaaS, SaaS)
Application layer (Customer in PaaS, Provider in SaaS)
diagrams.purpose: Clarifying who owns what at each cloud service layer

diagrams.title: SLA Management Lifecycle
diagrams.description: Flowchart showing phases of SLA from definition to renewal
elements: Decision: Meet targets? Yes → Continue, No → Claim credits → Negotiate improvements
Arrow showing cyclical nature returning to Phase 1

diagrams.title: Service Credit Tiers
diagrams.description: Visual showing typical SLA credit structure based on downtime severity
elements: 99.9% target: Below 99.9% = 10% credit, Below 99% = 25% credit, Below 95% = 50% credit
Scale showing increasing penalty with severity
Monthly fees and credit caps typically apply
Timeline showing measurement is usually monthly
Callout: Credits are refunds, not penalties - provider still meets obligations
diagrams.purpose: Understanding financial remedies in SLA violations
